title: Odesa bears brunt of latest Russian attacks on Ukraine – Europe live
summary_full: Across country, at least 14 have been injured as Zelenskyy highlights importance of air defencesIn more uplifting news, a Polish social media influencer has raised more than £50m after a nine-day, non-stop online stream during which he was joined by a parade of celebrity guests to help a charity supporting children battling cancer.Streaming from a studio flat in right-bank Warsaw, social media influencer Piotr Garkowski, 23, nicknamed Łatwogang, listened to a charity song dedicated to children battling cancer on loop for nine days straight, filling time with entertaining dares and celebrity appearances. Continue reading...
